---
title: Barbra and Lisa's Magical Statistics Adventure (working title)
author: Barbra and Lisa
date: today
format: 
  typst: default
  docx: default
  revealjs:
    theme: blood
    transition: fade
    slide-number: true
    css: styles.css
    smaller: true
    scrollable: true
    incremental: false
    output-file: slides.html
---
```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
library(targets)
library(gtsummary)
library(ggplot2)


#| label: summary-table
tar_read(pretty_summary)

#| label: age-plot
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 6
tar_read(expense_age_plot)


#| label: scatter-plot
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 6
tar_read(combined_trend_plot)


#| label: regression-output
# Since regression_results is a raw 'lm' object, 
# we use tbl_regression to make it look pretty like the rest!
library(gtsummary)
tar_read(regression_results) |> 
  tbl_regression()
